bead.title: bench-pr-A4: parity fixtures, parity diff allowlist, and Go runner execution redirect
bead.description:
PROBLEM: The old Go runner must remain available long enough to capture representative parity fixtures, then its execution subcommands must be disabled with a redirect once the bash runner can run the canary. Governing artifact: plan-2026-05-15-benchmark-runner-simplification. Dependency ID: fizeau-163efede. Sibling dependency: execute after A2 can run the canary and after A3 has budget and signal behavior if those fields appear in reports.
ROOT CAUSE: cmd/bench/matrix.go:1 is still the only committed execution baseline, and cmd/bench/main.go:1 still exposes matrix, sweep, run, and plan execution subcommands instead of directing users to scripts/benchmark/benchmark.
PROPOSED FIX: Before the deactivation commit, run the Go runner against the canary profile sindri-lucebox and bench-set tb-2-1-canary with 3 reps and commit 3 representative cell reports under scripts/benchmark/testdata/parity/go-runner/. During this child, run the bash runner against the same canary and commit matching cells under scripts/benchmark/testdata/parity/bash-runner/. Add scripts/benchmark/testdata/parity/diff.sh using bash and jq to compare committed fixtures and report divergence outside an allowlist for cell-id, timestamps, paths, and new fields such as harbor_runner_image_digest and model_server.commit. Modify cmd/bench/main.go so execution subcommands matrix, sweep, run, and plan short-circuit with one-line redirect 'use ./benchmark - see scripts/benchmark/README.md' and exit 2, while listing subcommands profiles and bench-sets remain functional until PR F.
NON-SCOPE: cell-report.schema.json (PR B); final tasks_from / task_executor bench-set schema (PR C); Node collector (PR D); Node importers (PR E); deleting cmd/bench (PR F); docs beyond the required redirect text and existing README reference (PR G). Do not delete cmd/bench, alter listing subcommands, or update report schema outside parity allowlist needs.
ROLLBACK: If interrupted before Go fixtures are captured, do not merge the deactivation change. If interrupted after fixtures are committed, revert only this child bead's deactivation and parity-diff changes as needed; committed fixture cells remain audit evidence unless they are known corrupt.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestGoRunnerParityFixturesCapturedBeforeDeactivation: go test ./... -run TestGoRunnerParityFixturesCapturedBeforeDeactivation verifies 3 representative Go runner cell reports exist under scripts/benchmark/testdata/parity/go-runner/ and were captured before the cmd/bench execution redirect change.
2. TestBashRunnerParityFixturesCaptured: go test ./... -run TestBashRunnerParityFixturesCaptured verifies matching bash runner cell reports exist under scripts/benchmark/testdata/parity/bash-runner/ for sindri-lucebox plus tb-2-1-canary 3 reps.
3. TestParityDiffAllowlistClean: go test ./... -run TestParityDiffAllowlistClean and scripts/benchmark/testdata/parity/diff.sh against committed go-runner and bash-runner fixtures pass with only allowlisted divergence.
4. TestGoRunnerExecutionSubcommandsRedirect: go test ./... -run TestGoRunnerExecutionSubcommandsRedirect verifies fiz-bench matrix, sweep, run, and plan exit 2 with a message matching 'use ./benchmark', while fiz-bench profiles and fiz-bench bench-sets still work.
5. TestA4Gates: go test ./... and lefthook run pre-commit pass on a clean checkout.
